close_reason: split: edit-driven stability tests belong to D3 of everything-is-incremental (submit_code is append-only; comparators gate on CodeId); green verification already done at fz-knf.3 close
description: Tests via submit/drive: body edit => function fact bumps, module/code stable; reposition/whitespace/ns => all stable; signature/@spec edit => module bumps. Verify ScopeCode re-runs on resubmission off freshly-stored source. lib+matrix 0 failed, zero warnings. Update .agent docs on fact/revision identity. Remove any temp scaffolding.

comments.text: Closed as split. Edit-driven revision-stability tests (body edit => function fact bumps; whitespace/reposition => stable) are unimplementable through submit/drive today: submit_code is append-only (world.rs:187-203) and both horizon comparators gate on CodeId equality (identity.rs:648, 673) — any resubmission mints a new CodeId and bumps everything. Those tests become the acceptance tests of D3 (code-resubmission) in everything-is-incremental. Identical-recompute revision stability is already covered (drive_test.rs:2319, 3041, 4044). Arc verified green at fz-knf.3 close: 1686 lib + 510 matrix, 0 failed, zero warnings; no remaining knf scaffolding found (candidates are B1 deletions).

title: Revision-stability tests + full green + docs; strip remaining scaffolding
